---
title: "Resources"
---

# Course platforms

- [The Absalon course page](https://absalon.ku.dk/courses/70545) — quizzes, announcements, and exam
  materials. Check it weekly.

# Books & data

- [Mastering 'Metrics companion site](https://www.masteringmetrics.com/) — data and examples for the
  Angrist & Pischke book we use for causal inference.

# Help with R

- [My introduction to R](https://merlin-intro-r.netlify.app/) — a gentle starting point if R is new
  to you, or if you want a refresher before week 1.
- [Posit cheatsheets](https://posit.co/resources/cheatsheets/) — one-page overviews of `ggplot2`,
  `dplyr`, and friends. Good to keep open during the exercises.

::: callout-start
Stuck with R at home? Bring the problem to the **Friday exercise class** — that is exactly what it
is for.
:::
